title: Rocket Boots
description:
This adds THREE kinds of Rocket Boots, with varying levels of power to boost your mobility!

Rocket Boots, Frostburn Boots, and Lightning Boots!
body:
This datapack adds **3 kinds** of **Rocket Boots**, with varying levels of power! These boots all boost mobility, whether you are jumping across a forest's canopy, or need to reach the roof on a house you're building, this datapack has you covered!

I took some inspiration from one of my favorite games, *Terraria*, to make this datapack!

---

First, we have the normal ***Rocket Boots***. These boots can be crafted **early-game**, but can only carry you a maximum of 6 blocks. Here is how to craft them:

![2 Iron, 2 Redstone, 2 Gunpowder](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1151225659893485719/rocket.png)

\*Bonus: If you fly too close over to a mob while activating the boots, it will catch on fire!

---

Second, we have the ***Frostburn Boots***. These boots are a **middle-game** tool, and can carry you 12 blocks up! Here is their crafting recipe:

![2 Iron, 2 Blue Ice, 2 Powder Snow Buckets](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1151225651945279569/frost.png)

\*Bonus: If you fly too close over to a mob while activating the boots, it will get the wither effect from freezing!

---

Finally, the most powerful: ***Lightning Boots***. These are an **end-game** item which carries you 18 blocks. This is the crafting recipe:

![2 Gold, 2 Netherite, 2 Nether Stars](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1151225644441665536/lightning.png)

\*Bonus: If you fly too close over to a mob while activating the boots, it will get damaged!

---

**Thank you very much for downloading, like and follow this pack to recieve updates on it!**

If you have any questions, comments, or concerns, my discord is attatched to the page! Thank you!
